arts.ttl: Flick says Benfica won’t be ‘easy opponent’, talks UCL hopes
arts.sum: Flick also addressed the possibility of winning a Treble as the Copa del Rey semi-final with Atlético Madrid is also around the corner, and the coach says it’s a very difficult but achievable goal for his team. I don’t think they’re an easy opponent at all.”

arts.ttl: Lamine Yamal says Lionel Messi is not the player he'd want to be if he could be anyone
arts.sum: Lamine Yamal has dubbed Lionel Messi as the greatest sportsman on planet Earth at present, but admitted he would be born again as Neymar Jr when probed on a hypothetical scenario

Barcelona coach Hansi Flick launched an impassioned defence of referees in Spain on Friday, criticising how they have been treated and calling on the RFEF to take action.
